root.rep_text: รายงาน - งบทดลอง ส่งกรม
root.sql:
SELECT sc_acc_m_account_group_krom.group_krom as balsheet_group ,sc_acc_m_account_group_krom.group_krom_desc as balsheet_name
,sum( sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_between) as dr_between ,sum( sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_between) as cr_between
,case when sum( sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_bb ) > sum( sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_bb ) then sum(sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_bb ) - sum(sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_bb ) else 0 end as dr_bb
,case when sum( sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_bb ) < sum( sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_bb ) then sum(sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_bb ) - sum(sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_bb ) else 0 end as cr_bb
,case when sum( sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_amount ) > sum( sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_amount ) then sum(sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_amount ) - sum(sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_amount ) else 0 end as dr_amount
,case when sum( sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_amount ) < sum( sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_amount ) then sum(sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_amount ) - sum(sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_amount ) else 0 end as cr_amount
FROM sc_acc_m_account_group_krom LEFT JOIN sc_acc_m_account_master ON sc_acc_m_account_group_krom.group_krom = sc_acc_m_account_master.group_krom LEFT JOIN sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep ON sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id = sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.account_id WHERE 1=1 /*WHERE*/ GROUP BY sc_acc_m_account_group_krom.group_krom, sc_acc_m_account_group_krom.group_krom_desc
ORDER BY sc_acc_m_account_group_krom.group_krom ASC
